title: ICAI: Tax Audit Guidance Note ka Naya Exposure Draft (A.Y. 2026-27) Out Now!
content:
# ICAI: Tax Audit Guidance Note ka Naya Exposure Draft (A.Y. 2026-27) Out Now!

Ek important update hai. Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Income-tax Act, 1961 ke section 44AB ke under Tax Audit par Guidance Note ke liye ek Exposure Draft announce kiya hai. Yeh Assessment Year 2026-27 ke liye hai.

Yeh Exposure Draft 9th July 2026 ko release kiya gaya hai. Iska main objective hai members aur other stakeholders se feedback lena, tak ki final Guidance Note sabhi recent changes aur interpretations ko incorporate kar sake.

*   **Topic:** Exposure Draft - Guidance Note on Tax Audit under section 44AB of the Income-tax Act, 1961.
*   **Applicable Assessment Year:** 2026-27.
*   **Release Date:** July 09, 2026.
*   **Purpose:** Public comments invite kiye gaye hain for this draft. Yeh draft income tax provisions mein recent amendments, Finance (No. 2) Act 2024 aur Finance Act 2025 ke changes, aur Form No. 3CD mein latest amendments ko consider karke revised kiya gaya hai.

Sabhi Chartered Accountants aur businesses ke liye yeh zaroori hai ki is Exposure Draft ko thoroughly review karein aur apne valuable comments submit karein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/category/important-announcements)

*Published on: 9 July 2026*
